race.comment: SOHO PRINCESS (10) has two runs in Class 1 company this time, finding only one better first-up and while 8th of 10 last time, she was only 4 lengths from Ka Ying Cheer, who has since won again in better grade. The low draw should ensure she's a player here. CRICKETS CHIRPING (2) should be at peak fitness now after four runs back and will find this easier than last start, when only 1.3 lengths behind the talented Blue Hawaiian. SYMPHONITE (3) comes here off a break of five months. Worth noting she filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last time in work over 1205m at Warracknabeal and has trialled well. BRUTIFY (5) got off the mark over 1200m at Colac last start, scoring by 1.5 lengths, running his rivals ragged in a handy maiden and he'll make his own luck on speed again.
